message:
Release v0.3.0: bump workspace to 0.3.0 on asupersync 0.3 runtime

Bumps fastmcp_rust's workspace version from 0.2.1 to 0.3.0, aligning
the release line with the new asupersync 0.3.0 runtime that fastmcp_rust
depends on (asupersync workspace dep was already set to "= 0.3" in an
earlier commit that refreshed Cargo.lock).

Changes:
- workspace.package.version: 0.2.1 -> 0.3.0
- All 9 internal-crate cross-references bumped to "0.3.0":
  fastmcp-rust, fastmcp-core, fastmcp-protocol, fastmcp-transport,
  fastmcp-server, fastmcp-client, fastmcp-derive (package name for
  fastmcp-macros), fastmcp-console, fastmcp-cli
- Cargo.lock refreshed to reflect the new member versions

Library-updater pass:
- cargo outdated --workspace --depth 1: "All dependencies are up to
  date" — no major or minor bumps needed
- asupersync already at 0.3.0, rich_rust at 0.2 (0.3 not released)

Verification:
- cargo check --workspace --all-targets: clean
- cargo test --workspace: 3233 passed, 0 failed, 172 ignored
- No source code changes required for this release

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
